content: Standard Rust release artifact naming: {binary}-{version}-{target}.tar.gz (e.g. claudebar-0.1.0-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz). taiki-e/upload-rust-binary-action default is {bin}-{target}.tar.gz (no version in name, version in tag). Windows uses .zip. Checksum file: {archive}.sha256. SHA256 is the only acceptable algorithm (sha1/md5 insecure, b2 requires extra install on macOS). Upload both the archive and the .sha256 file as release assets.
